# `api.sellers.create`

> `POST /Seller` — Catalog

**Python**

```python
api.sellers.create(*, data: AddSellerRequest | dict) -> SellerDto
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab sellers create [--data ...]
```

POST /Seller.

Args:
    data: Seller creation payload with name and display_id.
        Accepts an :class:`AddSellerRequest` instance or a dict.

Request model: :class:`AddSellerRequest`

## Request body — `AddSellerRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `Optional[str]` | no | Seller name |
| `customerDisplayId` | `int` | yes | Customer display ID |
| `isActive` | `bool` | yes | Whether the seller is active |

## Response

Returns `SellerDto`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | `int` | yes | Seller ID |
| `name` | `Optional[str]` | no | Seller name |
| `customerDisplayId` | `Optional[int]` | no | Customer-facing display ID |
| `isActive` | `Optional[bool]` | no | Whether seller is active |
| `displayId` | `Optional[str]` | no | Deprecated display identifier — always null per captured responses |
